headline: S&P Dow Jones Indices Announces Change to the S&P/TSX Canadian Dividend Aristocrats Index
summary: S&P Dow Jones Indices announces the following index change to the S&P/TSX Canadian Dividend Aristocrats Index as a result of the monthly dividend review. Change will be effective prior to the open of trading on Wednesday, April 1, 2026.

headline: Why the valuation picture 'looks quite strong' for long-term investors
summary: Roundhill Investments CEO Dave Mazza explains to Yahoo Finance Head of News Myles Udland the trends he is observing in companies' valuations and P/E multiples (Price-to-Earnings) across the market (^DJI, ^IXIC, ^GSPC) as the Iran war persists.

headline: Stagflation alarm bells ring in the euro zone as energy crunch hits the global economy

headline: India’s private sector growth slows to over 3-year low in March, weighed down by Mideast conflict
